positive: A detailed, central, stylized illustration of a serene forest animal—a whimsical fox, curled and resting amidst delicate bioluminescent flora. The fox has a smooth, flowing silhouette and highly detailed fur texture. Surrounding elements include stylized ferns, glowing mushroom clusters, and whimsical vines, all rendered in a rich, contrasting color palette of deep sapphire blues, emerald greens, and warm golden accents. The composition should be perfectly centered, with strong, clean silhouettes suitable for apparel printing. Use a style combining Japanese Ukiyo-e print aesthetic with modern vector illustration, ensuring bold lines and high contrast. Dramatic, soft directional lighting highlighting the bioluminescence. Print-ready, high resolution, flat design elements.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, noise, jpeg artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, low detail, low contrast, photorealism, grainy, messy
